data.body: USER DECISION: build AC7 in FULL (verify-identity CLI + --since grandfathering + JSON report + CI merge-gate workflow) + AC1 (private-key write-guard) + AC10 (key_not_valid_at_era in verify_signature_result.schema.json). Remediate feature so ALL epic ACs met before landing. VERIFIED with user: landing submits ALL 8 changes atomically (single linear relation chain 558->...->581; Gerrit submitted_together=8; 4 fixes CANNOT land independently) — so feature must be acceptance-complete before submit. Filing 3 new stories under epic: AC1->fold change 558(ddbe/entity), AC10->fold 580(verdict/schema), AC7->fold 580(enforcement)+new CI workflow. Then one re-push, re-CI, close, re-verify epic, submit.
